title: Zehunz's Crops
description: this mod add a lot of new crops that will enchanced your minecraft experience and make mining not needed. and also it will feature custom mob and adventure.
body:
Zehunz Crop Mod introduces a new way to progress in Minecraft by growing resources instead of endlessly mining. This mod adds custom crops that yield valuable materials such as ores once fully grown, giving players a sustainable and less grindy alternative to mining.

Key Features:

1. Growable Resources: Plant special seeds to grow crops that drop coal, iron, and more.

2. Alternative Progression: Obtain ores through farming, reducing the need for extensive mining expeditions.

3. Balanced Gameplay: The crops take time to grow and may require specific conditions or upgrades, making the system rewarding without being overpowered.

Whether you're a builder who hates mining or a survivalist looking for efficient automation, this mod provides a fresh way to gather essential resources. Perfect for peaceful players or those seeking a twist on traditional gameplay.
